title: 2D smoke scene
expectations: Outer border: 1px DarkGray rectangle inset 4px from edges.
Two diagonal DarkGray lines corner-to-corner (X pattern).
Left panel: blue filled rectangle 88x72 at (16, vertical center - 36).
Right panel: green filled rectangle 88x72, mirrored on the right.
Center: red filled circle radius 28 at screen center.
Top bar: DarkGray strip with white text 'Novolis smoke' at (24, 22), 18px.
Footer: 'pre-Game visual check' in DarkGray at y near height - 36.
